metadata.title:
APPLE SHOW IS
ESTABLISHED

GROWERS DEMAND THAT sPo-
KANE IDEA BE MADE PER-
MANENT INSTITUTION AND
PROMISE STILL GREATER Co
OPERATION.

pages.raw_text:
\ Substantial encouragement for
The continuance of the national ap-
pie show as a permanent Spokane
and national feature was given
last night at meeting of the APP
pie growers in the armory. The
appreciation of the growers was
extended the apple show manage.
ment and promise of still better
exhibits next year made In a mo-
ton offered by III. M. Gilbert OF
North Yakima.


Encouragement and promise of
cooperation also came from H.
Dunlap, an Illinois fruit grower
and one of the show judges. He
pointed out that the northwest or
chardists have a great field in the
east in spite of the fact that the
east grows apples, and suggested
that holding an apple show in Chi.
cago would be great means OF
attracting more universal interest
in the horticultural possibilities of
this section OF the country.


The executive board of the ap-
pie show formally decided to hold
another show next year at today's
meeting, but no action will be
taken for some time on the loca-
ton.
